goal: Close all outstanding v3 research branches, run a weak-window repair specialist program on the immutable base, and produce a final v4 verdict before any medium-friction work is unlocked.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the baseline snapshot.
Every research branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted or rejected); no half-open branches allowed.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must not be revived.
Medium-friction wave (B1, B2) is locked unless all five unlock conditions are simultaneously satisfied.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair in a single research cycle.

stages.title: Полный closure-audit по прошлым планам
stages.objective: Compile a unified register of every unfinished item from previous plans and establish the v4 research project with immutable reference.
actions: Open a new research_project for v4.
Record a closure-audit enumerating all open items from v3.
Pin the immutable reference snapshot (active-signal-v1@1).
Define research_map axes for the v4 programme.
Produce a unified open-items register.
success_criteria: A single open-items register exists and the immutable reference is recorded in the project.

stages.title: Формально закрыть все незавершенные документы и memory-nodes прошлых планов
stages.objective: Eliminate all organisational debt — close hanging branches, create terminal nodes, and freeze past-plan memory.
actions: Create a terminal result node for v3 branch A1_high_iv_long_v1.
Verify rejected branches (A1b, A4, H1, H2, B1, B2) each have a terminal status.
Write a dedicated research_record: v3_final_report.
Update all registry statuses to reflect terminal decisions.
Confirm no branch remains without a terminal node.
success_criteria: No research branch in memory lacks a terminal status (promoted or rejected).

stages.title: Полностью закрыть ветку A2_iv_acceleration
stages.objective: Drive the main unfinished v3 branch A2 to a definitive terminal decision through feature contract, materialization, plausibility check, strict prototyping, and full acceptance chain.
actions: Define the feature contract for cf_iv_delta_1h (A2 core feature).
Materialize the feature on available data surfaces.
Check plausibility on the base-absent surface.
Build strict standalone prototypes (v2 and v3 variants).
Run the full acceptance chain: standalone quality, stability, integration.
success_criteria: A2_iv_acceleration has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.

stages.title: Полностью закрыть A3_broader_cl_transition (только если A2 не promoted)
stages.objective: If A2 was not promoted, drive the backup branch A3 to a terminal decision so it does not remain half-open.
actions: Define transition feature contract for broader CL-transition features.
Group transitions by economic meaning.
Check plausibility on the base-absent surface.
Build strict prototypes for each transition group.
Run the full acceptance chain: standalone, stability, integration.
success_criteria: A3_broader_cl_transition has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
stages.gate_hint: Execute only if A2_iv_acceleration was NOT promoted in stage_3. If A2 is promoted, skip this stage and mark A3 as formally skipped.

stages.title: Общий вердикт по low-friction wave
stages.objective: Produce a single hard verdict on whether the low-friction research space is exhausted.
actions: Compare all candidates (A2, A3 if run) against the immutable baseline.
Classify each candidate as: mainline-quality, specialist-watchlist, or rejected.
Record one of three outcomes: low-friction space exhausted / partial gain / promoted candidate found.
success_criteria: A single, binding low-friction final verdict is recorded with justification.

stages.title: Новая программа v4 — weak-window repair specialists
stages.objective: Test whether targeted repair of the weakest pockets in the immutable base can yield useful improvement, using at most 2 specialist hypotheses.
actions: Build a weakness atlas on the immutable base surface.
Select at most 2 weak pockets from the atlas.
For each weak pocket, formulate one specialist repair hypothesis.
For each specialist hypothesis, run a shortened but honest acceptance chain.
success_criteria: There is a documented answer: can targeted repair produce anything more useful than the current base, yes or no.

stages.title: Решение по medium-friction wave (unlock gate)
stages.objective: Decide whether to unlock the medium-friction wave (B1 cross-symbol leadership, B2 model-backed IV-routing) or keep it locked.
actions: Verify all five unlock conditions simultaneously: A2 terminal, A3 terminal or skipped, low-friction verdict recorded, weak-window repair completed, no promoted candidate.
If unlocked, evaluate branch B1: cross-symbol leadership hypothesis.
If unlocked, evaluate branch B2: model-backed IV-routing / compression hypothesis.
Record lock or unlock decision with reason.
success_criteria: A clear lock/unlock decision is recorded. If unlocked, B1 and B2 each have an initial assessment.
stages.gate_hint: Medium-friction wave is unlocked ONLY if ALL five conditions are simultaneously met: (1) A2 has terminal decision, (2) A3 is closed or formally skipped, (3) low-friction final verdict is recorded, (4) weak-window repair program is completed, (5) no candidate was promoted. If any condition fails, stage outputs a 'locked' verdict.

stages.title: Финальный отчет по v4
stages.objective: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing all v4 research outcomes, terminal decisions, and recommendations for next steps.
actions: Compile results from all stages into a single v4_final_report.
Record the overall v4 programme verdict.
Document any recommended follow-up research items.
success_criteria: A standalone v4 final report exists with all stage outcomes, terminal decisions, and next-step recommendations.

warnings: Parse confidence 0.90 — sub-steps within stages (e.g. 2.1–2.5, 3.1–3.5, 5.1–5.4) were not materialized as separate actions because the source text contained only headings without body text.
Stage 8 (final report) had empty objective/actions/criteria hints in the source; inferred from context.
